hooks.command: CMD=$(python -c "import os,json; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -r|rm -f|rm \*|del /f|rmdir /s|Remove-Item -Recurse'; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Run manually if intentional: ${CMD:0:120}" >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'pip install' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q '\-\-dry-run'; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct pip install not allowed. Add to requirements.txt instead: ${CMD:0:120}" >&2; exit 2; fi

WPATH=$(python -c "import os,json; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$WPATH" | grep -q 'rule_packs/'; then echo "CONFIRM REQUIRED: About to write to rule pack: $WPATH" >&2; echo "Rule pack changes affect risk scoring across all clients. Explicit user approval required." >&2; exit 2; fi

FPATH=$(python -c "import os,json; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FPATH" | grep -qE '(routers/.*[.]py|engine[.]py|auth[.]py|models[.]py|schemas[.]py)$'; then echo "[PostWrite] Running pytest after edit to $FPATH..." >&2; python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short --no-header >&2 || echo "WARNING: Tests failing after this edit - review before committing." >&2; fi

echo '[Stop hook] Verifying test suite before marking task complete...' >&2; python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=line --no-header >&2 && echo 'All tests pass.' >&2 || { echo 'STOP: Tests are failing. Fix before marking task complete.' >&2; exit 2; }
mkdir -p .claude/transcripts && echo "$(date -u '+%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ') PreCompact triggered" >> .claude/transcripts/compact_log.txt && echo '[PreCompact] Compaction event logged.' >&2
